name: [F2] 구글 캘린더 → Flora 할 일 등록

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, sourceChannel: 'google-calendar', sourceMessageId: $json.sourceMessageId, sourceText: $json.sourceText, status: 'todo', priority: 'p3', category: 'calendar', dueAt: $json.dueAt, relatedProject: $json.relatedProject || undefined, detailsMerge: { importedFrom: 'google-calendar', calendarEventId: $json.calendarEventId, location: $json.location || undefined, calendarSync: { eventId: $json.calendarEventId, origin: 'google-calendar', importedAt: new Date().toISOString() } } }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ (() => { const parsed = $('이벤트 파싱').first().json; const created = $json.task || {}; let msg = '📅 구글 캘린더 → Flora 등록 완료
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; msg += '
📋 ' + parsed.title; if (parsed.relatedProject) msg += '
📁 ' + parsed.relatedProject; msg += '
🗓 ' + parsed.dateLabel; if (created.id) msg += '
🆔 ' + created.id; return msg; })() }}
